proof:
by
  by_contra h1
  push_neg at h1
  have h2 : 0 < n := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h1
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
  have h3 : (⟨0, h2⟩ : I n) ∈ Set.univ := Set.mem_univ _
  obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := hf.right ⟨0, h2⟩
  exact Nat.not_lt_zero x.val x.property

by
  by_contra h1
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
  have h2 : 0 < n := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h1
  have h3 : (0 : Nat) ∈ I n := h2
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hf.right ⟨0, h3⟩
  exact (x.property : x.val < 0).elim

by
  by_contra hne
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
  have hn : n > 0 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hne
  have : 0 ∈ I n := hn
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hf.onto this
  exact (I_def 0 x.val).mp x.property

by
  by_contra h1
  obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_succ_of_ne_zero h1
  rw [hm] at h
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
  have h2 : m ∈ I (m + 1) := by
    define
    linarith
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hf.right h2
  have h3 : x.val ∈ I 0 := x.property
  define at h3
  linarith

by
  by_contra h1
  have h2 : n ≥ 1 := Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr h1
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
  have hempty : empty (I 0) := I_0_empty
  have hne : ∃ x, x ∈ I n := ⟨⟨0, h2⟩, Set.mem_univ _⟩
  obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := hne
  have honto := hf.right
  obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := honto x
  exact (hempty y.val) y.property
